violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Potentially hazardous food in a prep cooler maintained an internal temperature of 44-50 F
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for the sanitizer buckets was not maintained at the proper concentration of 200 ppm.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Potentially hazardous food in a prep cooler maintained an internal temperature of 44-50 F
Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Ice paddles were stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
